zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway於從1215年到1223年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，他的父親Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch29歲，母親Eve Amabilia de Galloway30歲。他於大約1250年與Eve Stewart of Lennox在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1258年被列為jusiciar of galloway。他去世於大約1275年在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway于从1215年到1223年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，他的父亲Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch29岁，母亲Eve Amabilia de Galloway30岁。他于大约1250年与Eve Stewart of Lennox在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1258年被列为jusiciar of galloway。他去世于大约1275年在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Red
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the English surname, which for the most part originated as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion (from Old English rēad ‘red’ compare Reid ). In other cases, it may have arisen as a local name, from Old English hrēod ‘reeds’ or rēod ‘cleared land’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway was born from 1215 to 1223, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch, was 29 and his mother, Eve Amabilia de Galloway, was 30. He married Eve Stewart of Lennox about 1250, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1258, his occupation is listed as jusiciar of galloway. He died about 1275, in his hometown, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway est né du 1215 au 1223, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eve Amabilia de Galloway, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Eve Stewart of Lennox environ 1250, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1258, sa profession de son indiquée est jusiciar of galloway. Il est décédé environ 1275, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway von 1215 bis 1223 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch 29 und seine Mutter Eve Amabilia de Galloway 30. Er hat um 1250 in Scotland Eve Stewart of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1258 ist sein Beruf als jusiciar of galloway aufgeführt. Er starb um 1275 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway è nato il da 1215 a 1223 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eve Amabilia de Galloway, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Eve Stewart of Lennox circa 1250, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1258, la sua occupazione è indicata come jusiciar of galloway. Morì circa 1275, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Gallowayがから1215年まで1223年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenochは29歳，母Eve Amabilia de Gallowayは30歳であった。約1250年にスコットランドでEve Stewart of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1258年，職業はjusiciar of gallowayと記録されている。彼は約1275年に故郷で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway(이)가 1215년 부터 1223년 까지 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eve Amabilia de Galloway(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 스컷랜드에서 Eve Stewart of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1258년, 그의 직업은 jusiciar of galloway이었다. 그는 대략 1275년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway nasceu de 1215 a 1223, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eve Amabilia de Galloway, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve Stewart of Lennox aproximadamente 1250, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1258, sua profissão aparece como jusiciar of galloway. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1275, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway родился с 1215 по 1223 в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve Amabilia de Galloway, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve Stewart of Lennox около 1250 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1258 году он работал по профессии jusiciar of galloway. Он умер около 1275 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway nació desde 1215 hasta 1223, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Richard Comyn Lord Of Badenoch, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eve Amabilia de Galloway, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Eve Stewart of Lennox aproximadamente 1250, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1258, su ocupación registrada era jusiciar of galloway. Murió aproximadamente 1275, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
